prompt:
A notebook page with track sketches and comparison cues distinguishing steady non-blinking satellite paths from aircraft-like traces, laid on a dark observing table. A small star chart and red flashlight nearby make it clearly a practical classification note sheet.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low light, realistic paper and pen textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the notes page centered and uncluttered.
